v0.1.0.description:
## RWBY: Grimm Eclipse Archipelago

[Setup Guide](https://github.com/nepcore/RwbyAP/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup_en.md)

### Items
* Level unlocks
* Character unlocks
* Character skills
* Artifacts (this games McGuffin)
* Character XP

### Locations
* Every pot, crate, etc
* Every artifact
* Every encounter
* For control centers every wave and flawless waves
* Level clears
* Character level ups

### Goal

The goal is to get enough artifacts and beat the final boss

### Notes

* Currently there are very few YAML options to make it easier to get something released, more options will be added in future updates.
* For mutually exclusive character skill choices the seed decides which one you get. YAML options may be added in the future.
* Some levels have randomly selected split paths, these are currently fully up to RNG. Planning to provide some amount of player control in the future.
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
* Added support for the team JNPR DLC
* Added option for the number of level up checks per character
* Added option for how many characters to include at most
* Added option to prevent specific characters from being included
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.2.0-rc1.description:
* Added support of online co-op
* Added death link
* Added an option to change how many characters are unlocked at the start

To play together with others simply have every player connect to the same archipelago slot from the archipelago entry in the main menu.
v0.2.0-rc1.title: v0.2.0-rc1
